items.name: Student-Burnout
items.description: Explainable Machine Learning Framework for Predicting Student Burnout and Academic Risk

items.name: Studentburnout
items.description: Explainable Machine Learning Framework for Predicting Student Burnout and Academic Risk using behavioral data, machine learning models, and Explainable AI (SHAP & LIME) to enable early intervention and improve student success.

items.name: GA-Breast-Cancer-Diagnosis
items.description: An explainable machine learning framework for breast cancer diagnosis using Genetic Algorithm (GA)-based feature selection, Support Vector Machine (SVM) classification, and SHAP explainability.

items.name: EdgeSign-An-IoT-Enabled-Edge-Cloud-Hybrid-System-for-Real-Time
items.description: EdgeSign: An IoT-Enabled Edge–Cloud  Hybrid System for Real-Time Sign Language Translation. The system captures hand gestures  using a camera connected to a Raspberry Pi and extracts hand landmarks using the MediaPipe  framework. These landmarks are processed using a machine learning model to recognize  predefined gestures.

items.name: Athlete-performance-forecasting
items.description: Machine learning framework for athlete talent evaluation and draft outcome prediction using collegiate performance analytics.

items.name: T2D-Islet-Covariate-Sensitivity-Analysis
items.description: Companion repository to:  Romero R. "Transcriptomic Architecture of Type 2 Diabetes in Human Pancreatic Islets: An Integrative Meta-Analysis and Machine Learning Framework for Biomarker Discovery."

items.name: Data_Preprocessing_Library
items.description: An installable Python packaging framework designed to automate machine learning data preprocessing.

items.name: SecurTalent-AI
items.description: Unsupervised machine learning framework and deterministic low-level metadata parsing engine designed to mitigate adversarial text injection vulnerabilities in automated data processing channels.

items.name: cosmicml-biodetect
items.description: CosmicML-Biodetect is a machine learning framework for analyzing exoplanet  atmospheres using transmission spectroscopy data. It implements Physics-Informed  Neural Networks (PINNs) that enforce atmospheric physics constraints during  training, enabling detection of biosignature gases (O₂, CH₄, O₃) from  spectroscopic observations.

items.name: A-Lightweight-Supervised-ML-Framework-for-Near-Zero-False-Positive-Network-Anomaly-Detection
items.description: This repository contains a high-precision, machine learning-based framework for detecting network intrusions using the NSL-KDD dataset. The project implements a unique preprocessing-consistent pipeline designed to maximize operational reliability and reduce "alert fatigue" in resource-constrained environments.

items.name: Anaemia-Type-Prediction
items.description: This project predicts the type of Anaemia in patients using machine learning techniques, specifically the XGBoost algorithm and a Sacking Ensemble Classifier.. After preprocessing the data , we apply XGBoost—a powerful gradient boosting framework known for its accuracy and efficiency—as a base model.

items.name: Hybrid-Econometric-SEM-Machine-Learning-Framework-for-Agricultural-Technology-Adoption-in-Nigeria
items.description: This study develops a hybrid econometric–SEM–machine learning framework to analyze adoption of indigenous agricultural machinery among smallholder farmers in Niger State, Nigeria. Results show adoption is driven by awareness, perceived benefits, ease of use, and farm size, supporting scalable financing strategies.

items.name: FRIS-Predictive-Risk-Framework
items.description: Financial Risk Intelligence System (FRIS): A modular machine learning framework developed for New England College to predict student loan default risk, optimize institutional retention, and ensure federal compliance.

items.name: healthcare-data-quality-framework
items.description: Developed a reusable Pandas-based data quality framework for healthcare data that checks missing values, duplicates, implausible clinical value ranges, inconsistent categories, date logic, and statistical outliers. Results are exported as Markdown and CSV reports to support analytics, BI, and machine learning workflows.

items.name: Yield-Prediction-
items.description: A hybrid quantitative finance model reconstructing the global yield curve using a calibrated Cox-Ingersoll-Ross (CIR) stochastic framework and a Machine Learning term premium extractor. Achieved an out-of-sample global R² of 0.86.

items.name: Interpretable-ML-Health-Data-Science
items.description: Implementing interpretable machine learning models and post-hoc explainability frameworks for predictive health data analytics.

items.name: quant-alpha-engine
items.description: A high-performance quantitative trading research framework for statistical alpha discovery, signal generation, and large-scale backtesting on multi-million-row financial datasets without machine learning.

items.name: modelbench
items.description: benchmarks machine learning models across all frameworks

items.name: Analisis_Sentimen_Pengunjung_Wisata_PantaiBensam
items.description: Aplikasi berbasis web untuk melakukan analisis sentimen secara real-time terhadap ulasan pengunjung objek wisata *Pantai Benteng Samudra (Bensam), Kabupaten Pesawaran, Lampung. Proyek ini diimplementasikan menggunakan algoritma *Machine Learning *Multinomial Naive Bayes* dan dideploy menggunakan framework *Streamlit*.

items.name: GeoAI-LULC-Classification
items.description: A GeoAI framework for Land Use Land Cover classification using Sentinel-2 data, feature engineering, and machine learning models including Random Forest, XGBoost, CART, and KNN.

items.name: Boundary-Condition-based-Machine-Learning-Driven-Domain-Decomposition-for-Efficient-DSMC-Simulations
items.description: Developed a machine-learning-driven framework for rapid prediction of rarefied hypersonic flow fields and efficient DSMC domain decomposition, reducing computational cost while preserving solution accuracy.

items.name: django_project
items.description: This is a simple example of deploying machine learning model using django framework

items.name: pacman-QLearning-agent
items.description: Q-learning Pacman agent using epsilon-greedy exploration. Solution for a Group Coursework of a Machine Learning module, built on the UC Berkeley AI Pacman framework

items.name: EdgeAI-Deployment-Pipeline-for-Embedded-Systems
items.description: A hardware-agnostic Edge AI deployment framework enabling portable and optimized machine learning inference across heterogeneous embedded platforms using ONNX, TensorFlow Lite, Apache TVM, and OpenVINO.

items.name: IPred-S-1.0
items.description: The IPred-S 1.0 (Inhibitor Predictor for sEH, version 1.0) pipeline implements a two-stage machine learning framework for predicting sEH inhibitors.

items.name: Interpretable-Seizure-Detection-EEG
items.description: An interpretable machine learning framework for automated epileptic seizure detection using multi-domain EEG features and SHAP explainability.

items.name: Physics-Guided-ML-for-Optimized-Grid-Generation-in-Rarefied-Hypersonic-Flows-7
items.description: A boundary condition–based machine learning (BCML) framework is developed for rarefied hypersonic flow-field prediction and mesh generation around re-entry bluff bodies. Trained on DSMC data, BCML predicts flow properties and generates mean-free-path-based meshes, reducing cell count and computational cost while maintaining accuracy."

items.name: Customer-Segmentation
items.description: Developed a customer segmentation framework that classified customers into distinct behavioral clusters, generated actionable business insights, and enhanced customer targeting through Machine Learning, SQL analytics, and dashboard reporting.

items.name: Moontrace
items.description: A machine learning framework for Lua obfuscator attribution, structural fingerprinting, and AST-based code analysis.

items.name: Brain-tumor-classification
items.description: Brain Tumor Classification is a hybrid deep learning and machine learning framework. The project focuses on extracting highly discriminative deep features from multiple pretrained CNN architectures including ResNet, VGG16, and EfficientNet-B0.

items.name: PPML-SMS-Spam-Detection
items.description: A Privacy-Preserving Machine Learning (PPML) framework for SMS spam detection. Classifies messages over encrypted data with 0% accuracy loss using Microsoft SEAL (BFV scheme), C++, and Python.

items.name: GeoMicrobiome-Intelligence
items.description: An AI-ready geospatial framework integrating global soil microbiomes, environmental covariates, and spatial machine learning for ecological analysis and prediction.

items.name: tenflowers
items.description: A pure Rust implementation of TensorFlow, providing a full-featured machine learning framework with Rust's safety and performance.

items.name: Student-Stress-Monitoring
items.description: Implementation: Protecting Student Mental Health with a Context-Aware Machine Learning Framework for Stress Monitoring

items.name: anaphalyxis-physiological-monitoring-
items.description: Developing a framework that uses machine learning to predict anaphylaxis trajectory during the post-epinephrine window by interpreting physiological signals in real time to determine whether a patient is stabilizing or escalating toward a second dose or emergency intervention.

items.name: Machine-Learning-Based-RTL-level-Delay-Slack-and-Power-Prediction
items.description: Developed a machine learning framework to analyze and predict post-synthesis timing and power metrics from RTL designs using synthesis and static timing analysis data.

items.name: KC-ML-Framework
items.description: The **KC-ML framework** integrates biological priors (pathway enrichment and protein-protein interactions) as soft constraints into multi-model machine learning to improve feature stability and cross-cohort generalizability in transcriptomic prediction.

items.name: dexa
items.description: Decentra(Decision Central) is a Decision-Oriented Machine Learning framework for transforming predictive models into actionable decision systems.

items.description: Repository for Final Year Project regarding Machine Learning Framework for Analog Circuit Design Optimsation

items.description: From Data to Pedagogy: A Framework for Integrating the Volve Oilfield Dataset into Data Analytics and Machine Learning for Petroleum Engineering Undergraduate Curriculum

items.description: Educational and research-oriented AI framework exploring machine learning from first principles, progressing from linear regression and autograd to attention and transformers.

items.name: ZeuzBornSC667
items.description: I am a mechatronic student, specializing in microchip architecture, malware and payload analysis. I am currently taking SOC and penetration testing courses, with an emphasis on drone AI engineering using Python OpenCV machine learning frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch)

items.name: Building-Life-Cycle-Carbon-Prediction-Ethiopia
items.description: Machine learning framework for predicting building life cycle carbon emissions using XGBoost, SHAP, PDP, and scenario analysis.

items.name: Canine-State-Inference
items.description: A multimodal machine learning framework for personalized behavioral state inference and anomaly detection in companion animals.

items.name: Hybrid-Intrusion-Detection-Framework-for-Network-Traffic-Analysis
items.description: Developed a machine learning-based intrusion detection system that combines signature-based and anomaly-based detection techniques to identify malicious network activities. Implemented data preprocessing, model training, and real-time traffic analysis to improve threat detection accuracy and reduce false positives.

items.name: graph-mlgo
items.description: GraphMLGO - Topology-aware Machine Learning Guided Compiler Optimizations Framework

items.name: Sparse-Autoencoders-for-Neural-Network-Interpretability
items.description: Developed a Sparse Autoencoder-based Machine Learning model to analyze neuron activations in deep neural networks. Identified meaningful hidden-layer features and reduced redundant activations to improve interpretability. Used Python and deep learning frameworks to understand and visualize internal neural network representations.

items.description: Hybrid Forensic Framework for Data Breach Analysis using Autopsy, Volatility 3, Machine Learning, and DikeDataset.

items.description: A sample-efficient handwriting generation framework that learns and reproduces writer-specific handwriting styles using handcrafted structural features and lightweight machine learning techniques.

items.description: Machine learning framework for traffic risk prediction and reliability-aware safety interpretation using large-scale accident data.

items.name: CA-OIR-Mw
items.description: The discovery and optimization of metallocene catalysts for olefin copolymerization traditionally rely on extensive experimental trial-and-error. This project presents a data-driven framework that integrates molecular descriptors, density functional theory (DFT) calculations, and machine learning (ML) models to accelerate catalyst development.​

items.name: CCOligoPred
items.description: Machine learning framework for predicting coiled-coil oligomeric states using register-specific physicochemical features.

items.name: Hybrid-FDTD-ML-BoundarySolver
items.description: Hybrid FDTD–machine learning framework for physics-constrained acoustic boundary modeling and wave propagation simulation.

items.description: A machine learning framework for seismic damage assessment of bridges using NGBoost. The project develops probabilistic models to predict bridge damage states under earthquake ground motions

items.name: anomaly_detection_app
items.description: A machine learning and deep learning framework for early detection of abnormal physiological patterns in psychiatric patients using wearable devices.

items.name: coherex
items.description: CoheRex-Integrity is a state-of-the-art computer vision and machine learning framework designed to detect **synthetic temporal tampering** (e.g., frame deletions, frame duplications, speed manipulation, clip splicing, and reverse playback) in videos.

items.description: Machine Learning framework for INR Forex Risk Assessment and Exchange Rate Forecasting

items.name: VectorForgeML
items.description: VectorForge ML is a modular machine learning framework built from scratch in C++, designed for performance and extensibility. The project focuses on implementing core ML algorithms manually and gradually evolving into a high-performance research-grade engine with optional R integration.

items.name: AIP-G-1.0
items.description: The AIP-G 1.0 (Alzheimer’s disease, Inhibitor Predictor for GSK-3β, version 1.0) pipeline implements a two-stage machine learning framework for predicting GSK-3β inhibitors for Alzheimer’s disease.

items.name: .github
items.description: Execution tooling and reference implementations for governed datasets compatible with the Access-PoD governance framework and the Q-Pathformer multi-state machine learning architecture.

items.name: petanquep-site
items.description: Petanque Partners develops AI-based quantitative research infrastructure, machine-learning forecasting models, and risk frameworks for liquid markets.

items.name: MLP-project-IA
items.description: Implementação de uma Rede Neural Multilayer Perceptron (MLP) do zero em Python, sem uso de frameworks de Machine Learning. O projeto utiliza neurônios com função sigmoide, algoritmo Backpropagation e Gradient Descent para treinamento, além de One-Hot Encoding para classificação de caracteres e salvamento dos pesos treinados.

items.name: post-theft-ussd-fraud-detection
items.description: Threat-model-based machine learning framework for post-theft USSD fraud detection in Nigerian mobile banking.

items.name: markowitz-regularized
items.description: This study investigates whether machine learning-based return forecasts can improve portfolio construction within a regularized Markowitz optimization framework. The resulting portfolios are evaluated through backtesting and compared with benchmark strategies using standard risk and return metrics.

items.description: The simplest, most atomic possible implementation of an end-to-end machine learning framework

items.description: AN AUTOMATED MACHINE LEARNING FRAMEWORK FOR CANCER CELL CLASSIFICATION

items.description: Cross-platform integrative transcriptomics pipeline for the paper: "Transcriptomic Architecture of Type 2 Diabetes in Human Pancreatic Islets: An Integrative Meta-Analysis and Machine Learning Framework for Biomarker Discovery"

items.description: Machine learning project that predicts social media engagement success using early persuasion signals, influencer authority, and algorithmic amplification in a two-stage framework.

items.name: Phishing-Tweet-Detection-and-Network-Spread-Simulation
items.description: An end-to-end NLP & Machine Learning framework for real-time Twitter spam/phishing classification. Features TF-IDF text representation, custom behavioral heuristic engineering, dynamic risk metric scoring, and class-weighted inference models.

items.name: paxml
items.description: Pax is a Jax-based machine learning framework for training large scale models. Pax allows for advanced and fully configurable experimentation and parallelization, and has demonstrated industry leading model flop utilization rates.

items.name: cleands
items.description: CleanDS is a lightweight Python framework for statistical modeling and machine learning. It supports regression, classification, clustering, shrinkage, ensembles, distributions, and dimension reduction with a unified API, formula notation, and model selection tools.

items.name: AutoInsight-AI
items.description: AutoInsight AI: An Explainable AutoML framework that transforms raw engineering datasets into insights through automated profiling, cleaning, feature engineering, machine learning, forecasting, and conversational analytics.

items.name: ensemble-models-performance-comparison
items.description: Machine learning project focused on comparing predictive models and ensemble methods under a structured evaluation framework.

items.name: Sustainable-approach-of-reduced-waste-using-Optimised-ml-Algorithm-for-predicting-crop-yields
items.description: This project presents a complete machine-learning framework designed to improve sustainable agriculture. It addresses the modern struggle with unpredictable crop yields, improper fertilizer application, and rising agricultural waste through an integrated approach combining Predictive Analytics and Computer Vision.

items.name: Restaurant-layout-optimizer
items.description: An agent-based restaurant simulator combined with a machine learning pipeline that finds optimal table layouts by minimizing waiter travel distance.  Built entirely from scratch — no frameworks, no library dependencies for the core simulation.

items.name: mdsalauddin-lab
items.description: Portfolio of Md Salauddin: Supply Chain Data Scientist & BI Specialist. Features advanced projects in operations analytics, machine learning frameworks, and large-scale data engineering. Currently pursuing an MBA in China

items.name: CompareOT
items.description: This repository contains the code and simulation framework used in the paper:      Comparing Optimal Transport and Machine Learning Approaches for Data Merging Under Missing Covariate Scenarios: Application to Clinical Research

items.name: Electricity-Peak-Demand-Prediction-AEP-
items.description: Developed a machine learning framework to predict peak electricity demand at daily and hourly levels using load and weather data. Built Random Forest models to identify peak periods, handled class imbalance, and evaluated performance with ROC-AUC and F1-score. Deployed via a Streamlit dashboard for forecasting and grid support.

items.name: Altfit
items.description: Altfit is an advanced movement analysis framework powered by machine learning. It utilizes TensorFlow Lite models to process motion-related data, enabling applications in fitness tracking, rehabilitation, sports performance optimization, and biomechanical assessments.

items.name: FDRS-digit-randomness-screening
items.description: A statistical and machine-learning framework for screening non-random digit patterns in raw numerical data from biomedical research.

items.name: Autoshield---Adaptive-Multi-Layered-Defence-for-Real-Time-DDoS-Mitigation
items.description: Autoshield is a multi-layered DDoS defense framework designed to detect and mitigate attacks across L3, L4, and L7 layers using Machine Learning. The system achieved 95%+ threat detection accuracy, reduced response time by 40%, and ensured 99.9% service availability through real-time traffic monitoring and anomaly detection.

items.name: An-Explainable-AI-Framework-for-Financial-Health-Scoring-and-Risk-Intelligence
items.description: This project develops an Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) framework for assessing financial health and predicting financial risk using machine learning techniques. The system analyzes financial indicators, performs data preprocessing and feature engineering, and generates interpretable risk scores to support data-driven decision-making.

items.name: Smart-Crime-Analytics-System
items.description: Hybrid Machine Learning Framework for Geospatial Crime Prediction and Demographic Pattern Analysis

items.description: "A collection of Machine Learning algorithms implemented from scratch using core mathematical concepts such as Statistics, Linear Algebra, Probability, and Calculus, without using machine learning frameworks like Scikit-Learn."

items.description: An Explainable Machine Learning Framework Integrating Hybrid Feature Selection and Interaction Modeling for Hepatitis C Stage Prediction

items.name: Projeto-Ataques-de-Inferencia-Machine-Learning
items.description: Framework experimental para analisar o trade-off entre Privacidade Diferencial, utilidade dos dados e risco de vazamento. Avalia o impacto de diferentes valores de ε usando modelos simples de ML e ataques de inferência. Consome datasets já privatizados por pipeline externo.

items.name: Neural-Network-From-Scratch-Python
items.description: A custom neural network built from scratch using Python without external machine learning frameworks. Includes forward propagation, backpropagation, training logic, and basic AI concepts implementation.

items.description: An end-to-end network security framework implementing Machine Learning ensembles (Random Forest + CNN) alongside Recurrent Bat Optimization (RNN) and Game Theory models to accurately detect botnets and dynamically mitigate real-time DDoS attacks on IoT infrastructure.

items.description: Protein Association Descriptor Machine Learning (PAD-ML): an MD-driven framework for identifying key determinants of protein association, interface formation, and dimer stabilization.

items.description: Open-source Python implementation of a multi-center computational framework for fibromyalgia: combines unsupervised machine learning for phenotypic clustering, multi-state Markov chains for stochastic trajectory modeling, and Andersen-Gill recurrent-event survival analysis
